name: MCP Server for Milvus
description: The Milvus MCP server enables AI applications to interact with Milvus vector databases using natural language commands. It allows AI models to perform vector searches, manage collections, and retrieve data without writing custom database queries. This integration facilitates seamless access to vector data, enhancing the capabilities of AI tools like Claude Desktop and Cursor.
